market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Modern home with free parking – 4‑guest comfort
Spacious 4‑guest house, free parking, premium style
Luxury modern stay for 4, free parking included
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to your spacious, modern home in the heart of the city – an entire house perfectly designed for up to four guests. The sleek interior combines contemporary design with all the comforts you need for a relaxing stay. Enjoy the convenience of free on‑site parking, ideal for travellers with a car. With a nightly rate of £250, this property sits at the higher end of the market, reflecting its premium finishes and prime location. Guests have consistently rated the home highly, earning a 4.69 overall score from 16 reviews, praising its cleanliness, style, and ease of check‑in. While the house is not yet a Superhost listing, the attentive host Zaf is ready to provide a seamless experience. Over the next 90 days, only 18.5% of the nights are booked, leaving ample opportunity for more guests to discover this gem. The open‑plan living area is perfect for unwinding after a day of exploring, and the fully equipped kitchen lets you prepare meals just the way you like them. Rest easy in comfortable bedrooms designed for a good night’s sleep. Book now to enjoy a stylish, well‑located home that offers both comfort and convenience, with the added perk of free parking for your vehicle.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space such as a patio or garden
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright exterior shot showing the driveway and free parking as the cover photo; it instantly conveys the high‑value parking amenity and invites clicks.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £250 (43% above the city median of £175) to around £190‑£200 to close the price gap and lift the 18.5% occupancy.
Add and prominently list missing high‑value amenities – Wi‑Fi, TV, and an outdoor patio – to meet guest expectations and improve the 2/10 amenity score.
Upload a full set of high‑resolution photos covering the living room, bedrooms, kitchen, bathroom, and exterior, then set the cover to the parking‑visible exterior to boost the 2/10 image score.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your home is priced 43% above the city median (£250 vs £175) yet only 18.5% of nights are booked in the next 90 days.
